response.justification: Candidate is a Senior/Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior/Mid role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and full-stack work, but severe seniority mismatch creates high overqualification risk: likely salary expectations gap, retention risk, and poor fit for a role designed for someone taking 'progressively more responsibility'. Also unclear PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy background) and on-site requirement may conflict with Berlin-based candidate's preferences.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack expertise far exceeding role requirements
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure experience aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massive seniority overqualification — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
Database stack mismatch — MongoDB-heavy experience, no clear PostgreSQL depth
Recent career gap and likely salary expectations misaligned with junior/mid budget
